2604.19565.title: Detecting Hallucinations in SpeechLLMs at Inference Time Using Attention Maps
2604.19565.paper_summary: Hallucinations in Speech Large Language Models (SpeechLLMs) pose significant risks, yet existing detection methods typically rely on gold-standard outputs that are costly or impractical to obtain. Moreover, hallucination detection methods developed for text-based LLMs do not directly capture audio-specific signals. We investigate four attention-derived metrics: AUDIORATIO, AUDIOCONSISTENCY, AUDIOENTROPY, and TEXTENTROPY, designed to capture pathological attention patterns associated with hallucination, and train lightweight logistic regression classifiers on these features for efficient inference-time detection. Across automatic speech recognition and speech-to-text translation tasks, evaluations on Qwen-2-Audio and Voxtral-3B show that our approach outperforms uncertainty-based and prior attention-based baselines on in-domain data, achieving improvements of up to +0.23 PR-AUC, and generalises to out-of-domain ASR settings. We further find that strong performance can be achieved with approximately 100 attention heads, improving out-of-domain generalisation compared to using all heads. While effectiveness is model-dependent and task-specific training is required, our results demonstrate that attention patterns provide a valuable tool for hallucination detection in SpeechLLMs.
2604.19565.paper_summary_zh: 語音大型語言模型（SpeechLLMs）中的幻覺存在重大風險，但現有的檢測方法通常依賴於昂貴或不切實際的黃金標準輸出。<lb/>此外，為文本基礎的 LLM 開發的幻覺檢測方法並未直接捕捉音頻特定信號。<lb/>我們研究了四個基於注意力的指標：AUDIORATIO、AUDIOCONSISTENCY、AUDIOENTROPY 和 TEXTENTROPY，旨在捕捉與幻覺相關的病理性注意力模式，並在這些特徵上訓練輕量級的邏輯回歸分類器，以便於高效的推斷時間檢測。<lb/>在自動語音識別和語音轉文本翻譯任務中，對 Qwen-2-Audio 和 Voxtral-3B 的評估顯示，我們的方法在領域內數據上超越了基於不確定性和先前注意力的基準，實現了高達 +0.23 的 PR-AUC 改進，並且能夠推廣到領域外的 ASR 設置。<lb/>我們進一步發現，使用約 100 個注意力頭可以實現強大的性能，相較於使用所有頭部，這改善了領域外的泛化能力。<lb/>雖然效果依賴於模型，且需要特定任務的訓練，但我們的結果表明，注意力模式為 SpeechLLMs 中的幻覺檢測提供了一個有價值的工具。
2604.19565.author: Jonas Waldendorf et.al.
2604.19565.authors: Jonas Waldendorf, Bashar Awwad Shiekh Hasan, Evgenii Tsymbalov
